name: USB Device Plugged
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: USB Device Plugged
SIGMA Description: Detects plugged/unplugged USB devices

False positives:
- Legitimate administrative activity

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('2003', '2100', '2102') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY USB Device Plugged on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('2003', '2100', '2102') AQL filter query
